name: Danzig
description: '''Danzig''' is an American [[Heavy metal music|heavy metal]] band led by former [[Misfits (band)|Misfits]] and [[Samhain (band)|Samhain]] frontman [[Glenn Danzig]]. Formed in 1987 in [[Lodi, New Jersey]] out of the latter band, its "classic" lineup included the eponymous vocalist and keyboardist (real name Glenn Anzalone), guitarist [[John Christ]] (real name John Knoll), bassist [[Eerie Von]] (real name Eric Stellmann) and drummer [[Chuck Biscuits]] (real name Charles Montgomery). Earning a major hit with a live version of its 1988 song "[[Mother (Danzig song)|Mother]]", the band's musical style fuses gothic atmospheres with [[blues]]-infused rock and metal. As of 2023, Danzig has released 12 studio albums (two consisting entirely of [[cover version]]s), two EPs, one [[Live on the Black Hand Side|live album]], and one [[The Lost Tracks of Danzig|compilation album]].
